z,Provide class for testing in French locale
CommaDecimalPointLocalec
See if platform has a decimal point as comma locale.
    Find a locale that uses a comma instead of a period as the
    decimal point.
    Returns
    -------
    old_locale: str
        Locale when the function was called.
    new_locale: {str, None)
        First French locale found, None if none found.
    Z
win32Z
FRENCH)
fr_FRz
fr_FR.UTF-8Z
fi_FIz
fi_FI.UTF-8N
locale)
platformr
Z	getlocale
LC_NUMERIC
	setlocale
Error)
localesZ
old_localeZ
new_localeZ
?/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/numpy/core/tests/_locales.py
find_comma_decimal_point_locale
Sets LC_NUMERIC to a locale with comma as decimal point.
    Classes derived from this class have setup and teardown methods that run
    tests with locale.LC_NUMERIC set to a locale where commas (',') are used as
    the decimal point instead of periods ('.'). On exit the locale is restored
    to the initial locale. It also serves as context manager with the same
    effect. If no such locale is available, the test is skipped.
    .. versionadded:: 1.15.0
    c
No French locale availabler
tst_locale
pytest
